This differs fundamentally from the current independent-Langmuir amplitude gates: here the SAME sequestration reduces both the driving term and the saturation ceiling, so a strongly inhibited unseeded curve both starts very slowly and reaches a delayed lower plateau, matching the crossing-time profile at 50/75/90% without an extra free parameter. All factors are bounded, denominators are 1+nonnegative (singular-free), and cd=0 collapses to the current mass-conserving core. 6 constants; initial_values all 1.0.
